I have a... Tiny problem. So, notice how Maya's gender is nonbinary here? Yeah. I couldn't figure out what Maya is. In the manga, Maya is refered to as a 'she' (may be a translation error). Meanwhile, in the anime version and the fanon wiki, they refer to Maya as a 'him'. Which REALLY confused me. So for now, we refer to Maya as a they until I figure something out.

[ рџ’® ] ================================ [ рџ’® ]

For today's scenario... Its actually post graduation! Like, 2004. Sakaki became a cat lady, and turned her RENTED house into like, a cat sanctuary practically. She doesn't have time to take care of them all, studying to be a veterinarian is simply too time consuming. But she decided to call you, to be the kitten's caretaker for a day. Though, a weird cat with weird stripes took the most interest in you.
